MUST: TutorRegistrationForm MUST usar Meta.fields explícito — MUST NOT usar '__all__' (RNF-004)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST validar que email no existe previamente en el sistema (RF-002-A)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST mostrar errores de validación en español (RNF-006)
TutorRegistrationForm.save() MUST capturar country_code desde kwargs y asignarlo a User.country_code (RF-002-B)
MUST_NOT: TutorRegistrationForm MUST NOT exponer campos user_type o is_staff (RNF-004)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST NOT usar '__all__' en Meta.fields (RNF-004)

MUST: ClientRegistrationForm MUST validar que email no existe previamente (RF-002-A)
ClientRegistrationForm MUST mostrar errores de validación en español (RNF-006)
ClientRegistrationForm.save() MUST capturar country_code desde kwargs y asignarlo a User.country_code (RF-002-B)
ClientRegistrationForm.clean() MUST requerir parent_name y parent_email cuando is_minor=True (RF-003-A)
MUST_NOT: ClientRegistrationForm MUST NOT exponer campos user_type o is_staff (RNF-004)
ClientRegistrationForm MUST NOT permitir registro de menor sin parent_email cuando is_minor=True (RF-003-A)

MUST: TutorProfileForm MUST exponer: bio, phone_number, hourly_rate, city, country, experience (RNF-004)
TutorProfileForm hourly_rate MUST validar max_digits=6, decimal_places=2 (RF-004-D)
TutorProfileForm MUST mostrar errores de validación en español (RNF-006)
MUST_NOT: TutorProfileForm MUST NOT exponer user FK o documents_required (RNF-004)

MUST: ClientProfileForm MUST exponer: bio, phone_number, city, country, grade_level (RNF-004)
ClientProfileForm MUST mostrar errores de validación en español (RNF-006)
MUST_NOT: ClientProfileForm MUST NOT exponer user FK o parent_email (RNF-004)

MUST: ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST render subjects_taught as primary and only subject selection widget (RF-016-B)
ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST limit selection to maximum 5 subjects (RF-004-A)
ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST usar Meta.fields explícito incluyendo subjects_taught (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST NOT render subjects legacy widget visible to the user — subjects legacy is DEPRECATED (RF-016-B)
ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST NOT allow selection of more than 5 subjects (RF-004-A)
ManageTutorSubjectsForm MUST NOT use '__all__' in Meta.fields (RNF-004)
